macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: Dow Jumps Over 1,300 Points on US-Iran Ceasefire News
items.summary: The Dow closed up more than 1,300 points following a two-week US-Iran ceasefire announcement, boosting investor hopes to ease global oil shortages. Stocks soared while oil prices plunged over 15%, dropping below $100 per barrel.

items.title: Oil Prices Drop Below $100 After Iran Ceasefire
items.summary: Oil prices fell sharply more than 15% to around $94 per barrel after the US-Iran ceasefire deal, reversing prior surges amid the conflict. Asian stocks retreated amid skepticism over the ceasefire's fragility, while oil prices rose again later.

items.title: Oil Prices Rise Again Amid Fragile Iran Ceasefire Skepticism
items.summary: Oil prices increased once more as Asian stocks traded lower due to doubts about the US-Iran ceasefire's stability. This follows an initial plunge after the ceasefire announcement.

items.title: GM Recalls Over 270,000 Chevrolet Malibu Vehicles
items.summary: General Motors announced a recall of more than 270,000 Chevrolet Malibu vehicles due to an unspecified safety issue. This is part of recent automotive recall trends.

items.title: Scott Bessent Sworn In as US Treasury Secretary
items.summary: Scott Bessent was sworn in as the 79th Secretary of the US Department of the Treasury. This leadership change comes amid ongoing macroeconomic developments.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Crypto Rallies as Middle East Ceasefire Boosts Bitcoin Above $71.8K
items.summary: Bitcoin surged 4.8% in 24 hours to $71.8K following positive news of a two-week Middle East ceasefire, with the broader crypto market capitalisation jumping 4% to $2.45 trillion. Leading gainers included ZEC (+22%), ICP (+13%), and Avalanche (+9.5%).

items.title: $195-627 Million in Crypto Futures Liquidations Amid Market Volatility
items.summary: Global cryptocurrency markets experienced significant volatility with approximately $195-627 million in crypto futures liquidations over 24 hours. Bitcoin traders faced short squeezes while Ethereum and altcoins saw long position liquidations.

items.title: Major Bitcoin Miners Continue Selling as BTC Remains 43% Below All-Time High
items.summary: Leading miners including MARA Holdings and Bitdeer have been selling Bitcoin holdings. Cango Inc. sold 2,000 Bitcoin in March to reduce debt, while reducing its production cost to $68,215.82 per coin—a 19.3% improvement from Q4 2025.

items.title: Retail Investors Accumulate Over 4.3 Million Bitcoin as Market Steadies Near $71K
items.summary: Bitcoin traded near $71,000 after facing resistance at $73,000, with retail investors showing significant accumulation activity. Market momentum eased as buyers demonstrated limited follow-through.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: Google Launches Offline AI Dictation App Using Gemma Models
items.summary: Google quietly released an offline-first dictation app powered by Gemma AI models, competing with apps like Wispr Flow. The app enables dictation without internet connectivity.

items.title: Meta Releases Muse Spark Model with Reasoning Capabilities
items.summary: Meta Superintelligence Labs launched Muse Spark, the first model in a new family following Llama 4, integrating reasoning into the Meta AI app. This marks Meta's renewed push in AI after significant investments.

items.title: OpenAI Raises Billions in New Funding
items.summary: OpenAI secured billions in fresh funding amid ongoing developments, while facing internal challenges and making economic proposals to regulators in DC.

items.title: Anthropic Suffers Major Claude Code Leak
items.summary: Anthropic experienced a significant code leak related to its Claude model, raising security concerns and evolving into a broader AI security issue.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Sony Lays Off Hundreds of Employees Amid PS5 Dashboard Beta Testing
items.summary: Sony is reportedly laying off hundreds of employees while pushing a new PS5 dashboard update to beta testers. The update changes the console's interface ahead of potential future hardware announcements.

items.title: Take-Two Interactive Lays Off AI Team
items.summary: Take-Two Interactive, parent company of Rockstar Games, has laid off its AI development team as part of ongoing industry cost-cutting measures.

items.title: Nintendo's Next Big Game Leaks Online Ahead of Release
items.summary: Nintendo's upcoming major title has reportedly leaked online just before its scheduled store release next week, sparking discussions in the community.

items.title: New Star Fox Leaks Emerge for Nintendo Switch 2
items.summary: Fresh leaks reveal details about a potential Star Fox game for the Nintendo Switch 2, alongside updates on other AAA titles and possible delays.

items.title: PlayStation State of Play Rumored for April 16
items.summary: Reliable leaker NateTheHate reports an unconfirmed PlayStation State of Play event scheduled for April 16, amid excitement for major 2026 releases and leaks.

items.title: Ubisoft Assassin's Creed Black Flag Remake Reveal Expected April 16
items.summary: Insider Gaming reports Ubisoft plans to unveil the Assassin's Creed Black Flag Remake, titled Creed Black Flag Reynct, next week on April 16.

items.title: Xbox Announces Summer Showcase and Gears of War: E-Day Direct for June 7
items.summary: Xbox has scheduled its Summer Showcase alongside a dedicated Gears of War: E-Day Direct on June 7, kicking off the season of major gaming announcements.

items.title: Upcoming Game Releases: Hades 2, Oblivion Remastered, and EA Sports NHL 26
items.summary: Hades 2 launches April 14 on multiple platforms including Cloud Xbox and PC; The Elder Scrolls IV: Oblivion Remastered hits Xbox Game Pass Premium on April 16; EA Sports NHL 26 arrives same day on Xbox Series X|S.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.
